stages.concept:
# Unit 086: 접속사 (명사절) that, whether, if - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 명사절을 이끄는 접속사 **that, whether, if**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **that** — ~라는 것 (명사절을 이끎)

> I think **that** she is kind.
> 나는 그녀가 친절하다고 생각한다.

> I know **that** he likes music.
> 나는 그가 음악을 좋아한다는 것을 안다.

> **That** he passed the exam is surprising.
> 그가 시험에 합격했다는 것은 놀랍다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: think, know, believe, hope, say 등의 동사 뒤에서 that은 **생략** 가능해요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **whether / if** — ~인지 아닌지

> I don't know **whether** he will come or not.
> 나는 그가 올지 안 올지 모르겠다.

> I wonder **if** she likes me.
> 나는 그녀가 나를 좋아하는지 궁금하다.

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 들어갈 수 '없는' 말을 고르세요.**
"(       ) he agrees is important." (그가 동의하는지가 중요하다.)
1. Whether
2. If ✅
3. That

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요. whether와 if 둘 다 "~인지 아닌지"라는 뜻이지만, 명사절이 주어 자리에 올 때는 if를 쓸 수 없어요.

> **Whether** he agrees is important. (주어 — whether만 가능)
> 그가 동의하는지가 중요하다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 주어 자리에서는 **whether만** 쓸 수 있고, if는 쓸 수 **없어요**.

🧑‍🎓 학생: that은 '~라는 것', whether/if는 '~인지 아닌지'! 주어 자리에서는 whether만 쓸 수 있다는 것도 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 086: 접속사(명사절) that, whether, if - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
(     ) she moved to a new school is surprising.
> **정답** That

---

**02.** I don't know ? he will come or not.
> **정답** whether

---

**03.** She told me ? she was happy.
> **정답** that

---

**04.** Do you know ? the store is open?
> **정답** if (whether)

---

**05.** The fact is ? she works very hard.
> **정답** that

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
If she is kind is well known.
(주어 역할)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** If → That

---

**07.** I wonder that he will come or not.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → whether (if)

---

**08.** That she will join us is not sure.
(~인지 아닌지)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** That → Whether

---

**09.** She asked me that I liked pizza.
(~인지 아닌지)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → if (whether)

---

**10.** Whether he is honest is true.
(~인 것이 사실이다)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Whether → That

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀가 올지 안 올지 모르겠다.
I don't know she will come or not.
> **정답** whether (if)

---

**12.** 그가 정직하다는 것은 사실이다.
he is honest is true.
> **정답** That

---

**13.** 나는 그녀가 행복한지 궁금하다.
I wonder she is happy.
> **정답** if (whether)

---

**14.** 중요한 것은 네가 최선을 다했다는 것이다.
The important thing is you did your best.
> **정답** that

---

**15.** 그가 참가할지 아직 모른다.
I don't know yet he will participate.
> **정답** whether (if)

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀가 올지 안 올지 확실하지 않다.
Whether she will come or not is not sure
> **정답** Whether / she / will / come / or / not / is / not / sure

---

**17.** 그가 선생님이라는 것은 놀랍다.
That is he a teacher is surprising
> **정답** That / he / is / a / teacher / is / surprising

---

**18.** 나는 시험에 합격할 수 있을지 모르겠다.
I don't know whether I can pass the exam
> **정답** I / don't / know / whether / I / can / pass / the / exam

---

**19.** 문제는 우리가 시간이 없다는 것이다.
The problem that is we don't have time
> **정답** The / problem / is / that / we / don't / have / time

---

**20.** 그녀가 나를 좋아하는지 궁금하다.
wonder I if she likes me
> **정답** I / wonder / if / she / likes / me
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 086: 접속사(명사절) that, whether, if - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_______ she called you is true.
What
If
That
When
> **정답** That

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
I don't know _______ he passed the test.
if
that
what
whether
> **정답** if, whether

---

**03.** 주어진 문장을 아래와 같이 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을
모두 고르시오. (2개)
Is Amy good at badminton?
→I wonder ___________________________. 
whether Amy is good at badminton
if Amy is good at badminton
if is Amy good at badminton
that Amy is good at badminton
> **정답** if Amy is good at badminton, whether Amy is good
at badminton

---

**04.** 주어진 문장을 아래와 같이 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을
모두 고르시오. (2개)
Is it raining now?
→I'm not sure ____________________.
if it's raining now
that it's raining now
whether is it raining now
whether it's raining now
> **정답** whether it's raining now, if it's raining now

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 모두 고르시오.
The problem is _______ he doesn't know about the
computer.
if
whether
that
what
> **정답** that

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I wonder if he will write a novel.
His goal is if his team wins the game.
Whether it will rain or not is not certain.
They know that she won't come to the party.
> **정답** His goal is if his team wins the game.

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
My dream is that I travel around the world.
I wonder if he finished his homework.
If he won the game is true.
He doesn't know whether she lives in this
neighborhood.
> **정답** If he won the game is true.

---

**08.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
I will give her another book, if she likes this
book.
You can see the bakery, if you go to the left.
I don't know if he can play the violin.
If you arrive early, I will wait for you.
> **정답** I don't know if he can play the violin.

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
I know that it rained in Jeju yesterday.
That girl is my best friend.
That she told a lie is true.
The news said that a car accident occurred.
> **정답** That girl is my best friend.

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
I'm not sure whether he's hurt or not.
I wonder if she is a middle school student.
He said if she would arrive soon.
I don't know that he ate lunch or not.
> **정답** I wonder if she is a middle school student., I'm not
sure whether he's hurt or not.

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_______ she met him yesterday is not true.
I thought _______this food was delicious.
That (that)
If (if)
Whether (whether)
What (what)
> **정답** That (that)

---

**12.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I want to know ________ he worked in Google.
_______ you like this writer, I will lend you this book.
what (What)
if (If)
whether (Whether)
that (That)
> **정답** if (If)

---

**13.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 알맞지 않은 것을 고르시오.
_______________ doesn't matter.
That she knows the secret
That he's married
Whether Tom takes a taxi.
If Amy is poor or not
> **정답** If Amy is poor or not

---

**14.** 다음 밑줄 친 단어와 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
I wonder if she can swim.
which
what
that
whether
> **정답** whether

---

**15.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
그들은 나에게 이 박스를 옮길 수 있는지 물어보았다.
They asked me what I could move this box.
They asked me if I could move this box.
They asked me whether I could move this box.
They asked me that I could move this box.
> **정답** They asked me if I could move this box., They asked
me whether I could move this box.

---

**16.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그가 범인이라는 것은 나에게 충격을 주었다.
That he was the criminal shocked me.
Whether he was the criminal shocked me.
What he was the criminal shocked me.
If he was the criminal shocked me.
> **정답** That he was the criminal shocked me.

---

**17.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나의 희망은 강아지가 나와 함께 오래 사는 것이다.
My hope is if my dog lives with me for a long
time.
My hope is whether my dog lives with me for a
long time.
My hope is that my dog lives with me for a
long time.
My hope is what my dog lives with me for a
long time.
> **정답** My hope is that my dog lives with me for a long time.

---

**18.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
They wondered _______ there was treasure in the
cave.
I'm not sure _______ I'll meet Tom or not.
what
whether
if
that
> **정답** whether, if

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I don 't know that she 'll
like my gift or not.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** that → if (whether)

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I thought if he wrote the
book.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** if → that
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 086 접속사(명사절) that, whether, if중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 중 알맞은 것을 선택하여 빈칸에 써 넣으시오.
[that, whether, if]
It is certain  (     )  this food is spicy.
정답 that

---

**02.** 다음 중 알맞은 것을 선택하여 빈칸에 써 넣으시오.
[that, whether, if]
 the team won the game or not is not clear.
정답 Whether

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그녀가 결백하다는 것은 사실이다.
힌트 (     ) be, innocent
  (     )   (     )   (     )  is true.
정답 That, she, is, innocent

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 그들이 이 수업을 듣는지 아닌지 모른다.
힌트 (     ) take this class
I don't know  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
or not.
정답 whether (if), they, take, this, class

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
Jane이 그 작가를 좋아하는지는 확실하지 않다.
힌트 (     ) like the author
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  is not sure.
정답 Whether, Jane, likes, the, author

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그가 티켓을 샀는지 나는 모른다.
힌트 (     ) buy a ticket
I don't know  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 if (whether), he, bought, a, ticket

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그녀가 너에게 전화했는지 아닌지는 중요하지 않다.
힌트 (     ) called, whether, you, she, or, not
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  is not
important.
정답 Whether, she, called, you, or, not

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
Andy는 그녀에게 그녀가 핸드폰을 빌려줄 수 있는지 물었
다.
힌트 (     ) she, lend, could, him, if, her, phone
Andy asked her  (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     )   (     ) .
정답 if, she, could, lend, him, her, phone

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
너가 성공할지는 너의 노력에 달렸다.
힌트 (     ) you, whether, will, succeed
  (     )   (     )   (     )  depends on your
efforts.
정답 Whether, you, will, succeed

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 그녀가 한국음식을 먹어봤는지 확신하지 못한다.
힌트 (     ) tried, if, she, has, Korean, food
I am not sure  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 if, she, has, tried, Korean, food

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 086: 접속사 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_______ he visited you is true.
What If That When
> 정답: That

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
I don't know _______ she passed the quiz. if that what whether
> 정답: if, whether

---

**03.** 주어진 문장을 아래와 같이 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Is Tom good at basketball? →I wonder ___________________________. whether Tom is good at basketball if Tom is good at basketball if is Tom good at basketball that Tom is good at basketball
> 정답: if Tom is good at basketball, whether Tom is good

---

**04.** 주어진 문장을 아래와 같이 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Is it snowing now? →I'm not sure ____________________. if it's snowing now that it's snowing  now whether is it snowing now whether it's snowing now
> 정답: whether it's snowing now, if it's snowing now

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 모두 고르시오.
The issue is _______ he doesn't know about the project. if whether that what
> 정답: that

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I wonder if he will write a poem.
His goal is if his team wins the match.
Whether it will snow or not is not certain.
They know that she won't come to the event.
> 정답: His goal is if his team wins the match.

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
My dream is that I travel around the country.
I wonder if she finished her project.
If she won the match is true.
He doesn't know whether she lives in this town.
> 정답: If she won the match is true.

---

**08.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
I will give him another book, if he likes this one.
You can see the library, if you go to the right.
I don't know if he can play the drums.
If you arrive early, I will wait for you.
> 정답: I don't know if he can play the drums.

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
I know that it snowed in Tokyo yesterday.
That boy is my best friend.
That she told a lie is true.
The report said that a fire occurred.
> 정답: That boy is my best friend.

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
I'm not sure whether he's upset or not.
I wonder if she is a high school student.
He said if she would arrive soon.
I don't know that he ate dinner or not.
> 정답: I wonder if she is a high school student., I'm not

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_______ she met him last week is not true.
I thought _______this soup was delicious.
That (that) If (if) Whether (whether) What (what)
> 정답: That (that)

---

**12.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I want to know ________ he worked in Tokyo. _______ you like this author, I will lend you this novel. what (What) if (If) whether (Whether) that (That)
> 정답: if (If)

---

**13.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 알맞지 않은 것을 고르시오.
_______________ doesn't matter.
That she knows the answer That he's moved Whether Tom takes a bus.
If Amy is busy or not
> 정답: If Amy is busy or not

---

**14.** 다음 밑줄 친 단어와 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
I wonder if she can sing. which what that whether
> 정답: whether

---

**15.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) 그들은 나에게 이 상자를 들 수 있는지 물어보았다.
They asked me what I could lift this box.
They asked me if I could lift this box.
They asked me whether I could lift this box.
They asked me that I could lift this box.
> 정답: They asked me if I could lift this box., They asked

---

**16.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그가 범인이라는 것은 나에게 충격을 주었다.
That he was the suspect shocked me.
Whether he was the suspect shocked me.
What he was the suspect shocked me.
If he was the suspect shocked me.
> 정답: That he was the suspect shocked me.

---

**17.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나의 소원은 고양이가 나와 함께 오래 사는 것이다.
My wish is if my cat lives with me for a long time.
My wish is whether my cat lives with me for a long time.
My wish is that my cat lives with me for a long time.
My wish is what my cat lives with me for a long time.
